0.text: Ground-glass centriacinar nodular infiltrates in both lungs

1.text: More prominent ground-glass centriacinar nodular infiltrates in lower lobe basal segments on the right

2.text: More prominent ground-glass centriacinar nodular infiltrates in upper lobe inferior lingular segments on the left

3.text: Subsegmental atelectatic change in medial segment of right middle lobe

4.text: Linear subsegmentary atelectasis in anterobasal segment of right lower lobe

5.text: Linear subsegmentary atelectasis in inferior lingular segment of left upper lobe

6.text: Reticulonodular density increases in both lung apices consistent with scarring

7.text: Segmental tubular bronchiectasis in both lungs

8.text: Minimal peribronchial thickening in both lungs
